headline: US Stock Futures Gain as Crude Oil Drops on Iran: Markets Wrap
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Global stocks rose to record highs as crude oil fell after officials signaled the US was nearing a deal with Iran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz and restore oil flows. The dollar weakened.Most Read from BloombergNvidia CEO Urges Super Micro to Tighten Up on ComplianceTrump Doctor Visit Renews Health Scrutiny as 80th Birthday NearsTrump Says He’ll Announce Negotiated Deal With Iran ShortlyRubio Sees Good News Coming on Hormuz as Iran Talks ContinueUS, Iran Inch Toward Deal as Gaps

headline: BlackRock Stock: Is Wall Street Bullish or Bearish?
summary: BlackRock has underperformed the broader market over the past year, yet analysts remain highly optimistic about the stock’s prospects.

headline: BlackRock exec. on how Fed policy & midterms impact the market
summary: Deputy Head of Blackrock’s Portfolio Management Group, Mike Pyle, shares his biggest market risks with Yahoo Finance Executive Editor Brian Sozzi as the market ignores several geopolitical threats.
